content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Broad market modestly positive with Pharma (+2.4%), IT (+1.7%), Metal (+1.6%), and Energy (+1.3%) leading. Bank Nifty lagging (-0.2%) due to Axis Bank weakness. VIX cooling -3.2% to 19.08 suggests reduced anxiety. Book is already 54% deployed with 8 positions; focus must be on managing existing positions and trailing SLs rather than aggressive adds.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24150
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 78.00,
      "new_target": 85.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "HOLD equivalent — SL at 78 is just below S1 (78.36) and the recent consolidation low. Stock recovered intraday from 78.51 to 79.20, bullish PSU bank narrative intact (Q4 PAT +35% YoY, brokerage TPs Rs 88-90). Same SL/target as currently stored — emitting as HOLD via position_actions instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1025.03,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "No-op — current SL already at breakeven+ (1025 vs entry 984, locks in ~4% gain). Will emit HOLD via position_actions to avoid wasted MODIFY signal."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Down only 0.4%, well above SL 119. Gold consolidating after huge run; macro thesis (central bank buying, Fed cuts) intact. SL at 119 gives appropriate room for ETF volatility."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1418.00,
      "new_target": 1480.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "No-op vs current values — SL is already at breakeven+ and tight given stock at 52w high (1430.90). Stock holding above pivot 1402 with strong Q4 print. Switching to HOLD via position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 694.48,
      "new_target": 725.00,
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "No-op — SL already at 694.48 (above entry 681). Q4 results in 2 days (Apr 29) is event risk; tight SL appropriate. CMP 694.40 hugging SL — if it breaks, stops out cleanly with profit locked. Will emit HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2295.00,
      "new_target": 2480.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Tightening SL from 2260 to 2295 ahead of Apr 30 Q4 results (binary event in 3 days). Stock recovered from lows; FMCG sector rotation underway. Original SL at 2260 was 4.7% below entry — too wide for a name with binary event imminent. New SL 2295 (-3.3% from entry) reduces per-position risk. Risk-reward: 2295 SL, 2480 target vs CMP 2339 = 1:3.4."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 404.50,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "No-op — SL already at entry (breakeven). With +1.8% gain and stock at 52w high zone, 404.50 is appropriate. Will emit HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "INDUSINDBK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 855.00,
      "new_target": 920.00,
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Tightening SL from 850 to 855 — research flags BEARISH on FY26 PAT -65%, GNPA 3.43%, ongoing SFIO probe. Q4 bounce is overshadowed by structural concerns. Reducing target from 935 to 920 (more realistic given peer-relative weakness). Will exit on any sustained weakness."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 28,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 1810.00,
      "stop_loss": 1740.00,
      "target": 1920.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Power sector breakout — TORNTPOWER up 6.7% on 3.3x volume, breaking decisively above 52w high (prior 1744). Bullish marubozu yesterday + JERA partnership + Nabha acquisition catalysts. Position size ~5% of capital (50,680). SL at 1740 (3.9% risk) below prior 52w high which now becomes support. R:R ~1:1.6. NOTE: Already have NTPC and TATAPOWER pending order — this would make 3 power names; sized small to keep cluster <20% of capital."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Catalyst-driven 6.8% spike on Organon $11.75B acquisition, but research flags leverage concerns, premium 35x P/E, integration risk on largest-ever Indian pharma M&A. Intraday already faded from 1766 high to 1730. Chasing post-news pop is poor R:R. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Already have OPEN BUY LIMIT @ 612 from earlier — order hygiene rule prevents stacking. Letting existing pending order work; will not chase up to 623."
    },
    {
      "action": "CANCEL",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "reasoning": "Pending BUY @ 320.50 placed earlier — POWERGRID has run away from this level (sector strength). Cancel to free capital and avoid late entry. Already have NTPC + considering TORNTPOWER for power exposure."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATAPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Pending BUY LIMIT @ 443 already in book; CMP 453.65 has run above limit. Either it pulls back to fill or we let it expire. Not adding new chase order — would be cluster duplicate with TORNTPOWER + NTPC."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "AXISBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Down 3.7% on weak Q4 (provisions +61%). Trying to catch falling knife in a stock with multiple brokerage downgrades is poor R:R. Wait for stabilization."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "SAIL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Despite breakout to 52w high, research flags BEARISH — CMD vacancy through Jul, -18% 1y return, governance overhang. Better metals expression already pending via HINDZINC."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "IDFCFIRSTB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Banking sector mixed; ₹483 cr fraud impact still fresh. Already overweight financials (MAHABANK, PNBHOUSING, INDUSINDBK). Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ALKEM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Already hold GRANULES in pharma. Adding another pharma name would risk cluster concentration on a day pharma is already extended +2.4%."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "M&MFIN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Strong earnings catalyst but stock already gapped up 8%. Chasing extended NBFC after move. Already have PNBHOUSING for NBFC/HFC exposure."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at 78 is appropriate — below S1 78.36 and recent low 77. Strong PSU bank thesis intact, Q4 PAT +35%, broker TPs 88-90. Allow room despite -2.8% drawdown."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1025 (+4% above entry 984) — protects ~50% of unrealized gain. Strong Q4, GNPA 0.93%, 15% loan growth. Let it run toward 1100."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive ETF, modest -0.4% drawdown well above SL 119. Macro thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1418 already at breakeven+. Stock at 52w high after blowout Q4 (PAT +27%). Let it run; tight SL protects gain."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at 694.48 (above entry) — Q4 results Apr 29 is binary risk in 2 days. CMP 694.40 sitting on SL; if it breaks, exits with small profit. Acceptable setup."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 2295.00,
      "reasoning": "Tightening SL ahead of Apr 30 Q4 binary event. Original 2260 too wide for 3-day event horizon."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven 404.50, +1.8% gain, near 52w high. Power sector momentum + summer demand catalyst. Hold for target 425."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "INDUSINDBK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 855.00,
      "reasoning": "Tightening SL given bearish research read (FY26 PAT -65%, SFIO probe, GNPA 3.43%). Will exit on weakness; only kept due to strong Q4 print bounce."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "TORNTPOWER breakout entry placed. SUNPHARMA, HINDZINC, TATAPOWER on watch — existing pending orders may fill. AXISBANK avoided due to falling-knife dynamics; would re-evaluate if it bases above 1300 with volume.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book at 54% deployed with 8 positions across PSU bank, NBFC, FMCG, gold, pharma, energy, banking. Today's focus is position management not aggressive adds. Cancelled stale POWERGRID pending order to avoid late chase. Power cluster (NTPC held + TATAPOWER pending + TORNTPOWER new) needs monitoring — combined ~12% of capital still under cluster cap. Tightened HINDUNILVR and INDUSINDBK SLs to reduce per-position risk ahead of binary catalysts. Cumulative P&L +0.46% in 8 days — preserving capital is priority."
}
